initiatives.name: Alabama Cohosh
initiatives.description: We identify the immediate reproductive care needs of people in our community in Madison County, connecting people to appropriate resources within the community when possible, and filling the gaps when resources are unavailable.

initiatives.name: Land Trust of North Alabama
initiatives.description: Environmental stewardship through land conservation and public access. They coordinate preservation of natural areas and maintain 80+ miles of public trails.

initiatives.name: DSA North Alabama
initiatives.description: The North Alabama chapter of the Democratic Socialists of America

initiatives.name: At The Root Collective
initiatives.description: Building resource distribution, solidarity initiatives, and community care networks.
